task: Restrict Turtle paper trading entries and reconcile Alpaca paper state

governance_bootstrap.summary: Trading capital actions require Turtle parameters and completion reports require real verification evidence before closeout.
Completion requires real runtime verification evidence, state checks, and residual risk reporting for unverified items.

changes: Added LaunchAgent environment guards to block new paper entries with PAPER_TRADING_MAX_POSITIONS=0.
Reconciled Alpaca paper state to ASX, TSM, and VRT using existing live broker stop orders without submitting new orders.
Recorded the long-only versus short decision and 2-week paper remeasurement plan.

verification.name: Alpaca paper broker status
verification.result: passed: broker returned ACTIVE account, 3 long positions, and warning KPI state with portfolio underperforming SPY

verification.name: Alpaca open stop order coverage
verification.target: Alpaca paper trading API open orders
verification.command: read-only Python requests GET /positions and GET /orders?status=open
verification.result: passed: ASX, TSM, and VRT each had exactly one open sell stop order; no new orders were submitted

verification.name: LaunchAgent runtime guard reload
verification.command: launchctl bootout/bootstrap then launchctl print for com.harness.turtle-auto-trader and com.harness.ibkr-auto-trader
verification.result: passed: both agents not running and reloaded with PAPER_TRADING_MAX_POSITIONS=0 plus PAPER_PYRAMID_ENABLED=false

verification.name: Alpaca dry-run entry lock check
verification.result: passed: recognized ASX, TSM, VRT; reported 0 entries, 0 exits, 0 pyramid adds, and 12 skipped signals

verification.name: IBKR paper runtime check
verification.result: residual risk: connection refused on 127.0.0.1:4002, so IBKR broker-side positions and orders were not verified

verification.name: LaunchAgent plist lint
verification.result: passed: all four plist files were valid

verification.name: Turtle and IBKR regression tests
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_turtle_strategy_core.py tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_p0.py tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_p1.py tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_pyramid.py tests/test_ibkr_trader_b2.py
verification.result: passed: 59 tests passed with 1 existing dependency deprecation warning

residual_risk: IBKR Gateway/TWS was not reachable on paper port 4002, so IBKR broker-side positions and open orders remain unverified.
The installed LaunchAgents still include --execute so existing position exits can run; new entries are blocked through MAX_POSITIONS=0 and pyramiding is separately disabled.
docs/reports/paper_trading_positions.json is runtime state and was reconciled locally but is not tracked in git.
